Paste this sample screenplay into the "Raw Text" field:

INT. COFFEE SHOP - DAY

JOHN, a weary detective in his 40s, sits alone nursing a cold coffee.

SARAH (O.S.)
Mind if I join you?

John looks up, surprised.

JOHN
Sarah? I thought you were...

SARAH
Dead? Yeah, so did I.

She sits down, revealing a mysterious scar on her neck.
